title: Create Additional Recipies
description: Adds additional recopies to the Create mod
body:
This mod adds the following recipies:

## Compacting
### Tuff (x1)
- Flint (x2)
- Sandstone (x1)
- Lava (100mb)

## Mixing
### Arcane Essence (x7)
- Lapis Lazuli (x2)
- Blaze Powder (x2)
- Heated

### Cinder Essence (x7)
- Arcane Essence (x4)
- Blaze Powder (x2)
- Netherite Scrap (x1)
- Super Heated

### Common Ink (x1)
- Arcane Essence (x3)
- Glow Ink Sac (x3)
- Glass Bottle (x3)
- Experience Nugget (x3) OR Experience (9mb)
- Heated
